description: A token created for five licenses verifies and reserves with licenseCount five.
Token creation rejects invalid license counts before database access.
Tampering with a token payload, including its license count, invalidates the signature.
Existing reactivation route and token unit behavior tests remain green.
Runtime route tests authenticate a five-license request and reject old or invalid signatures.
The DB-backed reactivation ledger integration suite passes with the license-count token contract.
